name: Spinach Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen spinach and press out all excess water.
2. Heat the rice milk in a saucepan until hot but not boiling. Stir in the flour, then stir constantly until the mixture thickens slightly (about 3-4 minutes).
3. Add the nutritional yeast and thawed spinach to the sauce. Continue stirring until thick and gooey.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the onion and garlic until the onion is tender. Add the tomatoes, mushrooms, and spices, then cook until just done.
5. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Split each pita bread into two round pieces using a very sharp knife or cutting tool.
7. Place each piece of bread on a cookie sheet or pizza pan.
8. Spread the spinach sauce evenly over each pita half.
9. Top with the tomato mixture, being careful not to add too much juice that could cause burning.
10. Bake for 5-7 minutes, watching closely to ensure the edges of the pita do not burn. This yields enough for five individual pizzas.
